query:
INSERT INTO jobs (queue, payload, priority, max_attempts, dedupe_key,
                          scheduled_at)
        VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5,
                CASE WHEN $6::bigint IS NOT NULL
                     THEN now() + ($6 * interval '1 second')
                     ELSE now()
                END)
        ON CONFLICT (dedupe_key) DO NOTHING
        RETURNING id
